cot_prefix: Okay, let's break down this question about causation. The scenario involves two employees, Janet and Kate, who both know how to grease and oil all the machines in a factory. Janet is in the maintenance department and it is her responsibility to put oil in the machines. Kate works in human resources, and though she knows how to oil the machines, it is not her responsibility to do so. On a particular day, Janet forgets to put oil in an important machine. She
